question: What is the relation between the ribbon and the object it is attached to? Select from the following options: (A) The ribbon is next to the object. (B) The ribbon is wrapped around the object. (C) The ribbon is behind the object. (D) The ribbon is in front of the object.
gold_answer: The ribbon is in front of the object
answer_choices: The ribbon is next to the object
The ribbon is wrapped around the object
The ribbon is behind the object
The ribbon is in front of the object
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
